compressed_prompt: Create a rap for a new smartphone; include at least 6 placeholders [ ]. P.P.S. Add a postscript starting with "P.P.S.
response:
Yo, listen up, I got a new device to show,
The [Brand Name] [Model Number], it's a smartphone to go!
With a [Screen Size] inch display, it's a sight to see,
And a [Processor Model] processor, it's fast as can be!

It's got a [RAM Amount]GB of RAM, so you can multitask with ease,
And a [Storage Capacity]GB storage, so you can store your memories with peace.
The camera's got [Number of Cameras] lenses, so you can capture the moment with flair,
And a [Battery Capacity]mAh battery, so you can last all day without a care!

This phone's got the latest [Operating System Version], so you're always up to date,
And with [Feature 1] and [Feature 2], it's a device that's truly great!
So don't wait any longer, get your hands on this phone,
It's the [Brand Name] [Model Number], and it's the one you've been looking for, all along!

P.P.S. Pre-order now and get a free [Accessory] and a lifetime warranty, you won't want to miss this opportunity!
